factions.name: Steppe Nomads
factions.lore: Win by tempo, escape routes, and sudden board control.

passives.name: Open Roads
passives.description: If no capture is available, one normal piece may move one diagonal square backward.

passives.name: Dust Veil
passives.description: After a quiet move, the moved piece blocks the first normal capture against it.

ultimates.name: Dash
ultimates.description: Move one normal piece exactly two diagonal empty squares. Dash cannot capture.

ultimates.name: Sandstorm
ultimates.description: Block two empty dark squares from enemy quiet landings for one enemy turn.

factions.name: Iron Guard
factions.lore: Hold the center, survive attacks, and punish overextension.

passives.name: Shield Wall
passives.description: The first allied piece that enters a highlighted playable center square becomes guarded for the enemy turn.

passives.name: Vengeance Ledger
passives.description: After losing a piece, your next capture grants one extra Momentum.

ultimates.name: Fortify
ultimates.description: Choose one allied piece. For two enemy turns, that piece cannot be captured.

ultimates.name: Barricade
ultimates.description: Place two temporary blockers on empty dark squares for one enemy turn.

factions.name: Sun Court
factions.lore: Race for promotion and turn kings into pressure.

passives.name: Royal Pressure
passives.description: The first normal piece that enters the enemy final three rows grants Momentum.

passives.name: Crown Tax
passives.description: The first time the opponent promotes a king, gain two Momentum.

ultimates.name: Crown Surge
ultimates.description: Promote one normal piece in the middle rows immediately.

ultimates.name: Sun Lance
ultimates.description: One normal piece strikes like a king for a diagonal capture this turn.

factions.name: Void Order
factions.lore: Disrupt lanes, mark mistakes, and bend board geometry.

passives.name: Pressure Field
passives.description: Once per match, danger created by the opponent grants Momentum.

passives.name: Echo Mark
passives.description: The first enemy quiet move is marked. Capture it for Momentum.

ultimates.name: Phase Shift
ultimates.description: Teleport one normal piece up to 3 squares to any empty dark square, ignoring blockers.

ultimates.name: Collapse
ultimates.description: Void one empty dark square so no piece may land there for one turn.
